summary: The unmapped-space banner now explains Deep scan and offers a one-click rescan to map more used space.
introduced: About Deep scan callout in the unmapped-space banner — explains file-by-file indexing vs Fast scan estimates
changed: How to map more steps always include Deep scan with duration guidance and a Rescan with Deep Scan button
Coverage messages below 90% now suggest Deep scan when Fast scan may have left system folders estimated
